message: Good trout window right now — biting for the next ~36 min.
positive_factors: Stable atmospheric pressure is comfortable for fish
Partly cloudy skies are mildly favorable
A light breeze/ripple has a very favorable effect

tactics.where: Transition edges — the first drop-off off the shoreline — favor the windward shore
tactics.where_reason: mixed light; work the seam between shallow flats and deeper water; wind stacks plankton and baitfish on the wind-blown bank
tactics.method_reason: bass holding on structure are efficient to target with lures

fly_options.name: Woolly Buggers / leeches (slow strip)
fly_options.why: all-purpose in low light, wind, or stained water — both species

fly_options.name: Streamers (sculpin / baitfish)
fly_options.why: active fish chasing bait; strip on a sink-tip

fly_options.name: Nymphs (pheasant tail, hare's ear) under an indicator
fly_options.why: subsurface when nothing's rising / bright midday

spin_options.name: Spinners / spinnerbaits
spin_options.why: chop or cloud cover — cover water at mid-depth

tactics.season_note: Summer: bass prime in warm shallows early/late; trout slide deep and cool midday.
tactics.summary: Either — slight bass edge · Transition edges · Mid-depth — ~8–15 ft · lean spin fishing

notification.status: would notify, but NTFY_TOPIC is unset
